channel.title: Google AI Blog
channel.description: The latest news from Google AI

item.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
item.description: Today we're introducing Gemini 3.5, our most capable model yet with enhanced reasoning and multimodal capabilities.

item.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
item.description: At Google I/O 2026, we announced our vision for the agentic era powered by Gemini.

item.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
item.description: A roundup of everything we announced at Google I/O 2026 across AI, developer tools, and more.
